Title: Nanotechnology-driven coordination of shoot–root systems enhances rice nitrogen use efficiency

Common_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: carbon translocation supporting rhizosphere processes and nitrogen use efficiency
Common_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Upregulated under RF + Se ENMs, consistent with enhanced carbohydrate translocation from shoots to roots
Common_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: assessed in rice under reduced N plus Se ENMs at tiller stage
Common_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. OsSUT1 expression increased in RF + Se ENMs relative to RF/CK. 2. The study links this increase to enhanced carbohydrate transport. 3. Improved carbon allocation is associated with better root development and NUE.
Common_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: 30% reduced N fertilizer; foliar selenium engineered nanomaterials (Se ENMs)
Common_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Potential marker/target for improving carbohydrate allocation under low-N management with nanotechnology assistance
Common_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Accumulation_Site: leaves and belowground sink tissues/root-associated system
Common_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Transporter gene; included as core because it was directly assayed in Results as a major carbohydrate translocation gene.

Common_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: carbon translocation supporting rhizosphere processes and nitrogen use efficiency
Common_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Strongly upregulated under RF + Se ENMs; associated with unloading/translocation of sucrose
Common_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: assessed in rice under reduced N plus Se ENMs at tiller stage
Common_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. OsSUT2 showed one of the largest inductions after Se ENM treatment. 2. It is discussed as participating in sucrose unloading to stem tissues. 3. Enhanced transport is linked to root growth and improved NUE.
Common_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: 30% reduced N fertilizer; foliar Se ENMs
Common_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Useful target for improving source–sink carbon partitioning under reduced N input
Common_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Transporter gene directly measured in the study.

Common_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: sugar export/uptake supporting root development and rhizosphere carbon supply
Common_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Significantly upregulated by Se ENMs under reduced N, indicating enhanced sugar transport
Common_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: tiller-stage rice under RF + Se ENMs
Common_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. OsSWEET4 expression increased markedly with Se ENMs. 2. The paper links SWEET upregulation with enhanced carbohydrate translocation. 3. This contributes to rhizosphere stimulation and NUE improvement.
Common_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: 30% reduced N fertilizer; foliar Se ENMs
Common_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Candidate transporter target to support sugar delivery under low-N regimes
Common_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Paper cites prior evidence that OsSWEET4 is a plasma-membrane hexose transporter.

Common_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: mobilization of sugar reserves supporting root and reproductive organs
Common_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Upregulated by Se ENMs under reduced N; consistent with enhanced sugar mobilization
Common_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: tiller-stage rice under RF + Se ENMs
Common_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. OsSWEET5 transcripts were elevated after Se ENM treatment. 2. The study interprets this as enhanced carbohydrate mobilization. 3. Improved carbon flow supports root development and NUE.
Common_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: 30% reduced N fertilizer; foliar Se ENMs
Common_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Potential engineering target for sugar remobilization under fertilizer-saving systems
Common_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Paper cites prior work that overexpression may cause growth retardation/senescence, but this was not tested here.

Common_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: sucrose unloading/translocation linked to rhizosphere carbon supply and NUE
Common_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Upregulated by Se ENMs under reduced N, supporting enhanced carbohydrate transport
Common_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: tiller-stage rice under RF + Se ENMs
Common_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. OsSWEET13 expression rose with Se ENMs. 2. The paper associates this with sucrose unloading to stem tissues. 3. Increased source–sink transfer likely contributed to root and NUE improvements.
Common_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: 30% reduced N fertilizer; foliar Se ENMs
Common_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Potential source–sink allocation target for low-input rice systems

Common_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: sucrose unloading/translocation linked to rhizosphere carbon supply and NUE
Common_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Upregulated by Se ENMs under reduced N, supporting enhanced carbohydrate transport
Common_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: tiller-stage rice under RF + Se ENMs
Common_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. OsSWEET14 was induced by Se ENMs. 2. This transporter is discussed as contributing to sucrose unloading. 3. Enhanced carbon transfer is connected to improved root growth and NUE.
Common_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: 30% reduced N fertilizer; foliar Se ENMs
Common_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Potential transporter target in carbon-partitioning strategies for NUE improvement

Common_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: nitrogen uptake and remobilization supporting growth, tillering, protein/amino acid accumulation and NUE
Common_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Strongly upregulated by Se ENMs under reduced N; associated with increased nitrate uptake and restoration of tissue N content
Common_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: root expression under RF + Se ENMs at tiller stage
Common_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: qRT-PCR expression analysis; plant N content measurement
Common_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. OsNRT2.1 was strongly induced by Se ENMs under reduced N. 2. The paper links this to enhanced nitrate uptake/transport. 3. Upregulation contributed to recovery of plant N content and higher NUE.
Common_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: 30% reduced N fertilizer; foliar Se ENMs
Common_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Candidate target to enhance nitrate acquisition under low-N agriculture
Common_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Transporter gene directly quantified in Results.

Common_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: nitrogen uptake and remobilization supporting NUE
Common_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Upregulated by Se ENMs under reduced N, indicating enhanced high-affinity nitrate uptake
Common_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: root expression under RF + Se ENMs
Common_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: qRT-PCR expression analysis; plant/soil N measurements
Common_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. OsNRT2.2 expression increased markedly after Se ENM application. 2. The study relates this to higher nitrate absorption/transport capacity. 3. This helped sustain N content and NUE under reduced fertilizer.
Common_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: 30% reduced N fertilizer; foliar Se ENMs
Common_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Potential target for low-input rice improvement

Common_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Strongly upregulated by Se ENMs under reduced N, associated with improved nitrate acquisition
Common_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: root expression under RF + Se ENMs
Common_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: qRT-PCR expression analysis; N content analysis
Common_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. OsNRT2.4 showed one of the strongest inductions under Se ENMs. 2. The study infers increased nitrate uptake capacity. 3. This contributes to elevated NUE and sustained growth under reduced N.
Common_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: 30% reduced N fertilizer; foliar Se ENMs
Common_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Strong candidate transporter for improving NUE under reduced fertilization

Common_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Upregulated by Se ENMs under reduced N, consistent with enhanced nitrate transport/remobilization
Common_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: root expression under RF + Se ENMs
Common_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: qRT-PCR expression analysis; N content analysis
Common_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. OsNRT8.2 transcripts increased after Se ENM treatment. 2. The paper associates this with improved nitrate transport and remobilization. 3. Increased transporter expression supports recovery of NUE.
Common_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: 30% reduced N fertilizer; foliar Se ENMs
Common_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Potential target for improving nitrogen remobilization under fertilizer reduction

Common_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: ammonium uptake for plant nitrogen nutrition and NUE
Common_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Upregulated by Se ENMs under reduced N; associated with enhanced ammonium uptake
Common_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: root expression under RF + Se ENMs
Common_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: qRT-PCR expression analysis; soil available N and plant N measurement
Common_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. AMT1.1 was induced under Se ENM treatment. 2. The study links AMT induction to improved NH4+ uptake. 3. This supports restoration of plant N content and higher NUE.
Common_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: 30% reduced N fertilizer; foliar Se ENMs
Common_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Useful target for improving ammonium acquisition in low-input rice systems
Common_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Gene name reported without Os prefix in text.

Common_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: ammonium uptake for nitrogen nutrition and NUE
Common_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Upregulated by Se ENMs under reduced N, indicating enhanced NH4+ uptake capacity
Common_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: root expression under RF + Se ENMs
Common_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. AMT1.3 expression increased after Se ENM treatment. 2. The paper interprets AMT family induction as improved ammonium uptake. 3. This supports NUE improvement under reduced N.
Common_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: 30% reduced N fertilizer; foliar Se ENMs
Common_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Potential target to improve NH4+ uptake efficiency

Common_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: ammonium uptake for nitrogen use efficiency
Common_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Very strongly upregulated by Se ENMs under reduced N, indicating enhanced ammonium transport
Common_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: root expression under RF + Se ENMs
Common_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. AMT3.2 showed the strongest AMT induction with Se ENMs. 2. This is interpreted as improved ammonium absorption capacity. 3. Induction contributes to recovery of N status and NUE.
Common_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: 30% reduced N fertilizer; foliar Se ENMs
Common_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Promising target for engineering high NH4+ uptake under fertilizer-saving cultivation

Common_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Upregulated by Se ENMs under reduced N, consistent with enhanced NH4+ uptake
Common_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: root expression under RF + Se ENMs
Common_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. AMT5.1 was induced by Se ENMs. 2. The study links AMT induction to improved ammonium absorption. 3. This contributes to enhanced NUE under reduced fertilizer.
Common_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: 30% reduced N fertilizer; foliar Se ENMs
Common_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Potential marker/target for enhanced ammonium uptake in low-input rice

Common_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Upregulated by Se ENMs under reduced N, consistent with improved ammonium uptake
Common_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: root expression under RF + Se ENMs
Common_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. AMT5.2 was induced by Se ENMs. 2. Increased AMT expression is linked to enhanced NH4+ uptake. 3. This supports improved NUE and maintenance of plant N under reduced fertilization.
Common_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: 30% reduced N fertilizer; foliar Se ENMs
Common_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Potential target for nitrogen-efficient rice production

Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Upregulated by Se ENMs under reduced N, indicating enhanced starch biosynthesis/carbohydrate synthesis
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. OsBE1 expression increased strongly under Se ENM treatment. 2. The paper interprets this as increased carbohydrate synthesis. 3. Enhanced carbohydrate production supports carbon translocation and NUE improvement.
Pathway_Genes.End_Product_Connection_Type: supplies/storage form within carbohydrate pool supporting downstream translocation
Pathway_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: 30% reduced N fertilizer; foliar Se ENMs
Pathway_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Possible target to improve carbohydrate production under low-N conditions
Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Introduces α-1,6 branch points into α-1,4-glucan chains during starch biosynthesis
Pathway_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Included because directly assayed as a carbohydrate synthesis gene in Results.
Pathway_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: tiller-stage rice under RF + Se ENMs
Pathway_Genes.Protein_Family_or_Domain: Glycoside hydrolase family 13 / starch branching enzyme

Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Upregulated by Se ENMs under reduced N, indicating enhanced starch/amylopectin synthesis
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. OsSSIIa was significantly induced by Se ENMs. 2. The study interprets this as increased carbohydrate synthesis. 3. Higher carbohydrate production supports source–sink transport and NUE improvement.
Pathway_Genes.Pathway_Branch_or_Subpathway: amylopectin synthesis branch of starch biosynthesis
Pathway_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: 30% reduced N fertilizer; foliar Se ENMs
Pathway_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Potential target to boost carbon assimilation/storage under reduced N fertilizer
Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Extends α-1,4-glucan chains during amylopectin synthesis using ADP-glucose
Pathway_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Included because directly assayed in Results.
Pathway_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: tiller-stage rice under RF + Se ENMs

Regulation_Genes.Regulation_Mode: transcriptional/chromatin-associated promotion of tillering in response to nitrogen
Regulation_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: supports productive tillering and nitrogen-responsive growth; indirectly contributes to grain protein/amino acid status via improved N use
Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Discussed as a mechanistic regulator whereby increased N uptake under Se ENMs would promote tillering
Regulation_Genes.Regulatory_Effect_on_Target_Genes: facilitates expression of tillering genes through N-responsive chromatin modulation
Regulation_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Potential NUE/tillering regulatory target, but not directly tested here
Regulation_Genes.Other_Important_Info: This gene is mechanistically discussed in Results but not experimentally assayed in this study; included cautiously as a background regulator rather than a core tested regulator.
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. The paper cites NGR5 as a nitrogen-responsive tillering regulator. 2. Se ENM-mediated higher N uptake is proposed to activate NGR5-dependent tillering. 3. NGR5 itself was not directly measured or manipulated in this work.
Regulation_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: literature-supported inference only in this paper
Regulation_Genes.Protein_Family_or_Domain: transcription factor/regulator associated with nitrogen-responsive chromatin control
Regulation_Genes.Epigenetic_Regulation: recruits PRC2 according to cited literature
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: condition-dependent controller of N-responsive tillering, but not experimentally established here
Regulation_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: reduced N and Se ENM treatment context
